summary: A recurring 'Busted & Booted' USCIS segment that is entirely an animated U.S. map motion-graphic: a glossy red-white-blue title card and a pin that hops city to city (Fort Lauderdale, Santa Ana, Indianapolis, Miami, Atlanta) labeling each captured criminal. Although it carries a music bed and stylized branding, it contains no footage, characters, narrative, or cinematic genre framing -- it is an informational text-card/map graphics package, not a music-video or genre spectacle, so it falls out of scope.
notable_text: Fort Lauderdale, FL: Pablo Escobar's Pilot
Miami, FL: 14 Criminal Aliens in Accordance with the Laken Riley Act
Atlanta, GA: Manufacturing Owner Under Investigation for Labor Trafficking
